notes: **Batch 6 hold-out case 1** — added 2026-05-08 to test hybrid-v2's 120k threshold WITHOUT retuning. **Fills java-maven ecosystem gap (was 0/v2 → 1)**: Apache Dubbo's PR integration tests use Maven (dubbo-maven-plugin), and this run failed under java-maven workflow conventions. The orchestrator wrapper itself is not Maven (it uses docker-compose to spin sidecar containers per sample), but the underlying build is Maven so ecosystem=java-maven fits. flaky_or_transient=true (timeouts under shared docker-compose stacks are timing-sensitive). signal_position=late (failure block at L4885-4906 ≈ 80% of 6095-line log). log_size_bucket=large. failure_category=timeout_or_oom — third v2 timeout case (after nodejs+go-redis); first one in the java ecosystem. evidence_formats: timeout_marker (Run tests timeout) — fourth v2 case using this format.
